creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Hi,

Find here a reworked patch 

Regards,
Rodrigo

On 15/10/11 13:55 +0000, eadler@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: audio/lmms port upgrade to 0.4.12
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: eadler
> State-Changed-When: Sat Oct 15 13:55:11 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> a) version number is going backwords, b) uses spaces instead of tabs c)
> license is in the wrong place d) look at USE_LDCONFIG. If you need help
> please email ports@freebsd.org or hop on to the #bsdports IRC channel
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161415
>
